'''zamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideout|hideout]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideout|hideout]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zamaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæmækæth|zæmækæth]] || [[word:zæmækæj|zæmækæj]] || [[word:zæmækæsh|zæmækæsh]] || [[word:zæmækæ|zæmækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zamamakath|zamamakath]] || [[word:zamamakaj|zamamakaj]] || [[word:zamamakash|zamamakash]] || [[word:zamamaka|zamamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zamakath|zamakath]] || [[word:zamakaj|zamakaj]] || [[word:zamakash|zamakash]] || [[word:zamaka|zamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zamafkath|zamafkath]] || [[word:zamafkaj|zamafkaj]] || [[word:zamafkash|zamafkash]] || [[word:zamafkaf|zamafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zamakatha|zamakatha]] || [[word:zamakaja|zamakaja]] || [[word:zamakasha|zamakasha]] || [[word:zamakaka|zamakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zamakath|zamakath]] || [[word:zamakaj|zamakaj]] || [[word:zamakash|zamakash]] || [[word:zamaka|zamaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zamakathal|zamakathal]] || [[word:zamakajal|zamakajal]] || [[word:zamakashal|zamakashal]] || [[word:zamakakal|zamakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zamakathatha|zamakathatha]] || [[word:zamakajaja|zamakajaja]] || [[word:zamakashasha|zamakashasha]] || [[word:zamakaka|zamakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zamakathan|zamakathan]] || [[word:zamakajan|zamakajan]] || [[word:zamakashan|zamakashan]] || [[word:zamakakan|zamakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zamakathaoro|zamakathaoro]] || [[word:zamakajaoro|zamakajaoro]] || [[word:zamakashaoro|zamakashaoro]] || [[word:zamakakaoro|zamakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
